testcase.name: Register API returns 201 with new user
testcase.system-out: Given the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com".....passed When the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signup" with new user credentials.passed Then the API response status should be 201..................................passed

testcase.name: Register with existing email returns 400
testcase.system-out: Given the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com".....passed When the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signup" with valid credentials...passed Then the API response status should be 400..................................passed

testcase.name: Login returns error body on bad credentials
testcase.system-out: Given the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com".....passed When the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signin" with invalid credentials.passed Then the response body should contain an error message......................passed

testcase.name: AI Chat responds to a user query
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed And the user navigates to the AI Chat page..................................passed When the user asks AI Chat "What services do you offer?"....................passed Then the AI Chat should respond to the first query..........................passed

testcase.name: User can send a message via Chat with Vendor on a service detail page

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for com.cts.connectease.bdd.stepdefs.ui.ChatStepDefs$$Lambda/0x000002789159c6c8@5122387 (tried for 45 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\2479983\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:64392}, goog:processID: 25104, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:64392/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9b7312cc8bf0d1f89e99830125db4132 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.cts.connectease.bdd.stepdefs.ui.ChatStepDefs.theUserSendsAMessage(ChatStepDefs.java:85) at ✽.the user sends a message "Hello BDD Test"(file:///C:/Users/2479983/Desktop/ConnectEase-Automation/src/test/resources/features/regression/ui/CT_REG_Chat.feature:10)
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed And the user is on a service detail page....................................passed When the user clicks Chat with Vendor.......................................passed Then the chat panel should be open..........................................passed When the user sends a message "Hello BDD Test"..............................failed Then the message should appear in the chat window...........................skipped

testcase.name: Logged-in user can share a new story
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed And the user is on the community forum page.................................passed When the user creates a new forum post with title "BDD Test Post"...........passed Then the new post should appear in the forum................................passed

testcase.name: Customer logout redirects to login page
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed When the user clicks the logout button......................................passed Then the user should be redirected to the login page........................passed

testcase.name: Vendor logout redirects to login page
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a vendor.....................................passed When the user clicks the logout button......................................passed Then the user should be redirected to the login page........................passed

testcase.name: Unauthenticated access to chats page is redirected to login
testcase.system-out: Given the user is not logged in.............................................passed When the user navigates directly to "/chats"................................passed Then the browser URL should contain "/login"................................passed

testcase.name: Unauthenticated access to vendor dashboard is guarded

testcase.system-out: Given the user is not logged in.............................................passed When the user navigates directly to "/vendor/dashboard".....................passed Then the browser URL should contain "/login"................................failed

testcase.name: Search by keyword returns results
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed And the user is on the service listings page................................passed When the user searches for a service by keyword "plumb".....................passed Then search results containing "plumb" should appear........................passed

testcase.name: Sort listings by price
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a customer...................................passed And the user is on the service listings page................................passed When the user sorts listings by "price".....................................passed Then listings should be sorted accordingly..................................passed

testcase.name: Signup with duplicate email shows error
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the signup page........................................passed When the user enters an already registered email "vishal.user@gmail.com"....passed Then a duplicate email error should be displayed............................passed

testcase.name: Signup with password too short shows error
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the signup page........................................passed When the user enters a password "123" that is too short.....................passed Then a password length error should be displayed............................passed

testcase.name: Signup with invalid phone shows error
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the signup page........................................passed When the user enters an invalid phone number "175725783"....................passed Then a phone number error should be displayed...............................passed

testcase.name: Vendor can create a new service listing
testcase.system-out: Given the user is logged in as a vendor.....................................passed And the vendor is on the vendor dashboard...................................passed When the vendor fills in and submits the new service form...................passed Then the new service should appear in the listings..........................passed
